name: Figurine of Wondrous Power: Obsidian Steed
description: This polished obsidian horse can become a Nightmare for up to 24 hours. The nightmare fights only to defend itself. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 5 days have passed.

properties.activation_type: throw to a point on the ground within 60 feet

chaotic_behavior.effect: Ignores your orders, including command to revert to figurine form
chaotic_behavior.mounting_consequence: If you mount nightmare while it ignores your orders, you and nightmare are instantly transported to random location on plane of Hades, where nightmare reverts to figurine form
